articles.title: Ethereum’s Pectra Upgrade Moves Forward with Successful Hoodi Deployment
articles.description: TL;DR Ethereum is moving closer to deploying Pectra after successfully completing a test on the Hoodi testnet, created to avoid previous failures. The upgrade introduces improvements in wallets, validation, and scalability, allowing greater validator participation and rollup optimization. Pectra could go live on the mainnet by late April, though its launch may be delayed until. . . Read more

articles.title: Cosmos devs test IBC protocol between Hub and Ethereum to boost interoperability
articles.description: The development is part of the Eureka upgrade for Cosmos ecosystem, which is expected to release this year.

articles.title: Ethereum edges closer to deploying Pectra on mainnet with successful upgrade on Hoodi testnet
articles.description: Hoodi was launched earlier this month for final testing of the Pectra, following issues with previous tests on Holesky and Sepolia.
